use_cases: Displaying individual metrics or KPIs on a dashboard
Showing key statistics in a card-based layout
Presenting comparative data with titles and descriptions
Grouping related data points in a visually contained unit
Building dashboard interfaces with multiple metric cards
ai_summary: A minimalist card component designed for displaying statistics and metrics on dashboards. Built with Tailwind CSS, it provides a clean container with Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, and CardDescription subcomponents for structured data presentation. The component uses standard card patterns with subtle shadows and borders, making it suitable for SaaS dashboards, analytics interfaces, and any data-driven application requiring metric display cards.
